characters.name: Agnes Brown
characters.description: Agnes Loretta BrowneOccupationStall ownerBornJanuary 1943 (age 82)BirthplaceWest IrelandResidence92 James Larkin Court, FinglasFatherPatrick Redden (deceased)MotherConstance Redden (deceased)Corey TaylorSibling(s)Dolores FlanniganSpouse(s)Redser Brown (1961-19??)ChildrenMark Brown(1961),Cathy Brown(1964),Frankie Brown(1965),Trevor Brown(1966),Rory Brown(1967),Simon Brown(1978),Dermot Brown(1978)Chungus Brown(1982)First AppearanceThe MammyNumber of appearances30Portrayed byBrendan O'CarrollAnjelica Heuston (In Agnes Browne) Corey Taylor Anjelica Heuston (In Agnes Browne) Mrs. Brown is a well loved person who enjoys meddling in other people's lives, especially love life despite having none of her own. Her children love her, however she sometimes gets on their nerves by not understanding things properly. She is rude at times but will do anything to help her family and friends, and will irritate anyone who she believes is a threat to her family's well-being. Despite her introduction, in the sitcom, Agnes is quite warm and friendly right from the beginning Mrs Brown has a habit of mispronouncing words which Cathy will correct for her. "Bloody Preverts" (Perverts) "I got onto your top-top-tap-top" (Laptop) (Agnes is in the kitchen, whilst Cathy is on the phone to the local pizza delivery company. She is asking Agnes what she wants.) Agnes (after examining the menu) - "...I'll have the Pageone." Cathy (knowing her mother is confused)- "...and a Lasagne please. Thanks." Agnes - "Excuse me. I said the Pageone." Cathy (coming into the kitchen, points at the menu that Agnes was looking at) - "That's 'page one'!" Agnes - "Oh, now... I wouldn't like to be her." Cathy - "Who?" Agnes - "Sarah Le Pippelin." Cathy - "Who?" Agnes - "Sarah Le Pippelin. She was laid by 5000 men!" Cathy - "Let me see that. (reads the newspaper) Mammy, that's the Sahara Pipeline!"

characters.name: Barbara
characters.description: Basic info: Gender: Female "Barbara"is a recurring character in Mrs Brown's Boys. Although she appears several times throughout the series, mostly inFoley's, she doesn't actually speak untilNew Mammywhere she drops by the Brown household to check onRorywho has had an almighty bust-up withDinoand is feeling depressed. She makes some negative comments about Dino, calling him a "bitchy diva" before she realizes Dino is behind her and he tells her he has a new sweeping brush for her to try out.

characters.name: Birdie Flanagan
characters.description:
Birdie FlanaganResidenceJames Larkin CourtFirst AppearanceMammy ScissorhandsPortrayed byJune Rodgers  Birdie Flanagan is a neighbour and friend of Agnes.
She first appeared in the second episode of the 2023 miniseries "Mammy Scissorhands" where she moves into the house neighbouring Agnes'. Father Damien later introduces Birdie to Agnes and the pair befriend each other soon after. At first, Winnie was jealous of Birdie and believed that she was now Agnes' best friend, but Agnes later assured Winnie that she was just being welcoming to Birdie and that Winnie would always be her best friend.

characters.name: Bono Brown
characters.description: Age No information 17 Bono has a very cheery personality, but he appears to be a tad naughty like his granny, judging from the cheeky grin on his face after he tells Agnes that his mother calls her "an now cow such as firing arrows at him (though Agnes tells him to remove their rubber tips), playing with his false teeth, and watching him fart while asleep. According to Agnes, he is very sweet, kind and gentle,

characters.name: Bubbles
characters.description: Bubbles McCarthyResidenceFinglasSpouse(s)Mark (ex-boyfriend)First AppearanceMammy's Christmas PunchLast AppearanceMammy's Christmas PunchPortrayed byCiara O'Callaghan  Bubbles McCarthy (nee McGrath) isMark's ex girlfriend. Mark broke up with her just before he metBetty, 15 years before the events ofMammy's Christmas Punch, the only episode she appears in. In the episode, we learn that she was also married and divorced to another man as she attempts to get back with Mark.

characters.name: Buster Brady
characters.description:
Buster BradyOccupationFormer career criminal/promotorFatherMr. BradyMotherMrs .BradyFamityUnnamed grandparents (deceased)RelativesSadie Brady (possible relative)ChildrenBlister BradyFirst AppearanceMammy Rides AgainPortrayed byDanny O'Carroll Buster isDermotBrown's best friend. He was also Dermot's best man at his and Maria's wedding. His regular outfit consists of a baseball cap, a jacket (he wears three or four different jackets), tracksuit bottoms, and white trainers. Exceptions include when he wore his best man suit for Dermot and Maria's wedding, although he was still wearing his cap and trainers, and when he played the angel in the Nativity inThe Virgin Mammy, for which he wore a white cap. Buster's jacket and trousers both have security tags attached, implying they are stolen, and he almost never wears his cap backwards, except only briefly inMammy Swings!when he tried to get a sneak peek atAgnes Brown's new kitchen. Buster is always coming up with scams to make some easy money. The money he and Dermot made from one scam was used to pay for Jacko McGoogan's heart surgery. 
Buster meets his son Blister.

characters.name: Davi
characters.description: DaviResidenceAmericaFirst AppearanceA Madea HomecomingNumber of appearances1Portrayed byIsha Blaaker Daviis the grand-nephew of Redser andAgnes Brownand the first cousin once removed ofCathy,Mark,Rory,DermotandTrevor. He lives in the United States of America.

characters.name: Dr Flynn
characters.description:
Dr. Thaddeus Flynn.OccupationGeneral Practitioner. (S5 E3)FamitySheila Flynn (Aunt)Portrayed byDerek Riddin  Dr. Thaddeus Flynn is a General Practitioner and Finglas' resident doctor.
Dr. Flynn usually appears in the Brown household attending to Grandad. He is shown to be very capable in his job, despite Agnes often interfering when he is treating Grandad. He also gave Agnes her wish to have Grandad tested for mental problems, for him to be put in a home while she goes to the Galway Races.
Dr. Flynn is shown to have a minor romantic interest in Cathy. He also became self-appointed Head Judge of the judging panel of Father Damien's Christmas house decorating competition, and abused his position by giving the prize (two tickets to go see the Finglas Warriors football team in the finals) to his aunt, Sheila

characters.name: Father Damien
characters.description: Father Damien (played by Conor Moloney) is the priest who replacesFather Quinnwhen he goes on a retreat. Damien debuted inMammy Christmaswhere he tellsAgnesthat there won't be a Christmas Nativity, so Agnes decides to write her own version. In that same episode, Agnes senses Damien has a problem with interfering mothers, so she asks Trevor to find out what his problem is. Trevor eventually discovers that Father Damien and his mother have not spoken for five years. Agnes eventually convinces him to patch things up with his mother. At the end of the episode, Father Damien hands Trevor an envelope which he says is the Bishop granting permission to stage the Nativity. InThe Virgin Mammy, Father Damien makes some changes to Agnes' script for the Nativity, including Agnes' chosen title,Men Are Bastards. Unfortunately, during the Nativity, the magnetic animal bracelet that Agnes is wearing to help with her rheumatism causes her to get attached to Father Damien's belt buckle. When she tries to pull away, she ends up pulling off his trousers. Father Damien appears in five episodes in Season 3:

characters.name: Father Quinn
characters.description: Occupation: Priest Home:

characters.name: Gaston
characters.description: Gaston was Cathy’s boyfriend in the new year special of 2016. He had left a voicemail for Cathy and Agnes answer the voicemail. Agnes was surprised by his voicemail and the end was,”I want to squeeze you.” Cathy finally showed Gaston to the family. Betty was nice, Agnes said that he had the personality of a fucking speed bump, Sharon said that he was "a dick", Winnie told him a story, and Rory laughed at him. Cathy went home to get a apologetic answer from Agnes and he was calling Cathy kitty. Agnes didn’t like that so they said both said her name until Gaston said that her family is a disgrace and that Agnes was an "Olive Farmers Concubine" in which Agnes retaliated by hit him in the head. Gaston then preceded to call Agnes a "Camel's Scrotum" which prompted Cathy to kick him in the Crotch Area.

characters.name: Gregor
characters.description: Gregoris the secondary antagonist ofMrs Brown's Boys D'Movie,as a Russian Mobster, he was considered to be the antagonist of D'Movie, though this was the plot to reveal the true main villain. . He is played by Nick Nevern.

characters.name: Hilary Nicholson
characters.description: Hilary NicholsonHilary (Eilish O'Carroll)Hilary (Sorcha Cusack)Hilary (Susie Blake)CharInfoOccupationHead of the Finglas Parish CommitteeRelativesChildrenMaria BrownOtherSinbad Nicholson (husband,The Original Series)Jonathan Nicholson (husband,Mrs. Brown's Boys)Dermot Brown(son-in-law)John, George and Ringo Brown (grandchildren)AppearancesFirst AppearanceThe Last Wedding(The Original Series)Mammy's Secret(Mrs. Brown's Boys) Jonathan Nicholson (husband,Mrs. Brown's Boys)Dermot Brown(son-in-law)John, George and Ringo Brown (grandchildren) Mammy's Secret(Mrs. Brown's Boys) Hilary is very stuck-up, and doesn't get along well with many characters apart from Maria andDr. Flynn. The episode in which she's introduced in Mrs. Brown's Boys,Mammy's Secret, shows her meet withAgnesfor the first time and after witnessing her andBettyargue and seeingGrandadhalf-naked, she attempts to moveDermotand Maria's wedding to Italy. She's also said to be Head of the Finglas Parish Committee inMammy's Assand the head of the Parish Choir inMammy's Mechanical Merriment, showing her high status within the Finglas area.

characters.name: La La Doggy
characters.description: La La DoggyCharInfoOccupationWedding PlannerAppearancesFirst AppearanceMammy Swings! La La Doggyis a Wedding Planner and TV Host, who is the main antagonist ofMammy Swings!, the final episode ofSeries 3ofMrs. Brown's Boys. He is portrayed by Robert Doggett. La La is introduced inMammy Swings!as the host of a show called “Don’t Tell The Big Fat Gypsy Bride About The First Dance” asRoryexplains the staff atWash and Bloworganised for La La to be the wedding planner for him andDino.

characters.name: Mr. Wang
characters.description: Mr. WangCharInfoResidenceFinglasOccupationInstructor of Blind NinjasAppearancesFirst AppearanceMrs Brown's Boys D'MovieLast AppearanceMammy's Gamble(voice) Mr. Wangis the owner of the "Ninja School for the Blind" inMrs. Brown's Boys D'Movie. He is portrayed byBrendan O'Carroll. Mr. Wang is introduced inD'MoviewhenDermotgoes to meetBusterat Wang's Ninja School. We learn that Mr. Wang is from (or, at least claims to be from) Sichuan Province, China and that he's hired Buster to help him teach blind people how to become ninjas. Mr. Wang is introduced inD'MoviewhenDermotgoes to meetBusterat Wang's Ninja School. We learn that Mr. Wang is from (or, at least claims to be from) Sichuan Province, China and that he's hired Buster to help him teach blind people how to become ninjas. Later on in the film, Buster enlists the help of Mr. Wang and the other blind ninjas to break into the Revenue Office and retrieve the receipt ofAgnes' grandmother's tax bill. We learn that his father is dead and we also learn that he can be selfless, telling Buster to go on without him when they're escaping the Revenue Office. Outside of Ninja School, Mr. Wang is an entrepreneur and has worked with Buster on several other occasions, being the man behind the security system Buster provides Agnes with inMammy's Gamble. He also may be the owner of the "Wang Pooh's Stool Softener" product Dermot and Buster advertise inDing Dong Mammy.

characters.name: Professor Thomas Clowne
characters.description: Prof. Thomas ClowneThomas (The Original Series)Thomas (MBB)CharInfoResidenceUSA (post-Mammy's Inflation)OccupationProfessor, Psychologist, AuthorRelativesOtherCathy Brown(ex-girlfriend)AppearancesFirst AppearanceiMammy (Batteries Not Included)Last AppearanceMammy's Inflation Prof. Thomas Clowne is one ofCathy's boyfriends. He is portrayed by Mike Pyatt in both of his appearances. Clowne makes his first appearance iniMammy (Batteries not included)when he walks intoFoley'salongside Cathy, who is on the rebound following her break-up withMick. He is working on a book about how women's role in society has changed over the years, and becomes interested in interviewingAgnesfor it. Agnes andWinniealways pronounce his Swiss surnameclown, but Cathy is always quick to correct them. InMammy's Going, he attempts to interview Agnes for his book, but she ends up bringing him to tears after reminding him his mother didn't care for him when he was young.
